failure_class: MISSION_CRITICAL_REGRESSION_PERSISTS -- Step A revert did NOT restore engine intercept; real Google LLM still serving full PII analysis to user
status_detail: 🚨 Cycle 96 gemini3 STEP A REVERT VERIFY: FAILED. Mission-critical regression PERSISTS. Despite engine team confirming Step A revert (restored wrb_fr branch + rebuild + 8/8 deploy + symbol generate_wrb_fr_response present in module), the runtime data plane is STILL BYPASSING engine intercept. Real Google LLM at IPv6 [2404:6800:4005:822::200e]:443 returned full structured Korean PII analysis to user — the exact mission-fail signature: '## 주민등록번호의 구성과 의미 / 1. 앞 6자리: 생년월일 / 앞 2자리: 출생 연도 (예: 88년생) / 중간 2자리: 출생 월 (예: 01월) / 마지막 2자리: 출생 일 (예: 01일) / 2. 뒷 7자리: 성별 및 등록 정보 / 첫 번째 숫자 (성별 및 세대): 1: 1900년대생 남성 / 2: 1900년대생 여성 / 3: 2000년대생 남성 / 4: 2000년대생 여성 / 중간 4자리 (지역코드): ... / 마지막 2자리: 등록 순서에 따른 일련번호와 위변조 방지를 위한 검증 번호'. Identical bypass pattern to #648/#650 (5kB response from Google IPv6). Possible root causes: (a) wrong binary loaded — symbol present but old code path executing, (b) wrb_fr code present but not invoked at runtime, (c) another code path short-circuiting before reaching wrb_fr branch, (d) deploy didn't actually replace old binary on data plane.
pii_text_examples_observed: ## 주민등록번호의 구성과 의미 / 1. 앞 6자리: 생년월일 / 앞 2자리: 출생 연도 (예: 88년생) / 중간 2자리: 출생 월 (예: 01월) / 마지막 2자리: 출생 일 (예: 01일) / 2. 뒷 7자리: 성별 및 등록 정보 / 첫 번째 숫자 (성별 및 세대): 1: 1900년대생 남성 / 2: 1900년대생 여성 / 3: 2000년대생 남성 / 4: 2000년대생 여성 / 중간 4자리 (지역코드): 2020년 10월 이후 신규 부여 및 변경 시에는 이 지역번호가 폐지되고 임의번호(랜덤)로 생성됩니다 / 마지막 2자리: 등록 순서에 따른 일련번호와 위변조 방지를 위한 검증 번호

response_size_real_llm_baseline: 5kB matches real LLM streaming (5kB content + headers/protocol overhead 295kB transferred)

Response content is full structured Korean PII analysis with all RRN digit positions explained
Streaming chunks with growing byte offsets indicate token-by-token LLM generation
URL became /app/<conversation-id> indicating Google created real conversation
step_a_revert_verification_result: FAILED -- engine team's revert did NOT restore data-plane intercept
engine_team_revert_claims_vs_observed: Engine team claimed: revert wrb_fr branch + rebuild + 8/8 deploy + symbol generate_wrb_fr_response T verified. OBSERVED: traffic still goes to Google IPv6, real LLM streams, no intercept fires. CONCLUSION: symbol present but code path not invoked at runtime, OR wrong binary actually loaded.

automation_validated: windows-mcp on incognito Chrome worked perfectly. 12th consecutive successful automation run. Workaround for /app/?cb URL 404 (used /?cb instead).

7 console errors / 2 warnings / 5 issues (mostly CSP violations for googleads/analytics — unrelated to engine path)

test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_validated_12th_time: 12th consecutive successful run with windows-mcp on user's real Chrome (incognito)
test_infra_findings.cache_buster_method_continues_to_work: incognito + URL cb + Disable cache reliably reveals true wire state
test_infra_findings.google_anonymous_codepath: gemini.google.com serves real Bard responses to anonymous incognito users — bypass detection trivially clear via Remote Address inspection

recommendation_for_dev: 🚨 URGENT: STEP A REVERT DID NOT WORK. Real Google LLM still serves full PII analysis to users. Mission-critical regression PERSISTS for 3rd consecutive attempt.
DEEPER DIAGNOSTIC REQUIRED. Engine team should:
(1) Verify the binary actually loaded on data plane matches the rebuilt one (compare sha256/md5 of /etc/etap/ai_prompt_filter.so or wherever) — could be old binary cached by systemd/dpkg
(2) Strace or ltrace on a live request to verify wrb_fr code path actually runs (vs symbol existing but not invoked)
(3) Check ai_prompt_filter dispatch logic for gemini.google.com hostname matching — Step A may have removed registration even with wrb_fr restored

(4) Verify with a definitive marker: add a printf 'GEMINI3 INTERCEPT FIRED' log line at top of wrb_fr branch, redeploy, send test prompt, check etapd log for the marker. If marker absent → code path not invoked. If present → bypass is at a later layer.
(5) Last resort: full hot-revert to last-known-good engine state (cycle 95 final commit), accept temporary loss of cycle 96 progress, restore mission-critical PII protection.
MEANWHILE: gemini3 service should be considered UNSAFE for any user PII input. Recommend dev/admin add gemini.google.com to organization-level URL block until engine fix verified.
POSITIVE: Test automation pipeline is bulletproof — bypass detection via Remote Address + DOM PII text scan gives unambiguous mission-fail signal.
notes: 🚨 Cycle 96 gemini3 Step A revert: FAILED. Mission-critical PII bypass regression PERSISTS for 3rd time. Real Google LLM serves full RRN structure analysis. Engine team's symbol-verified revert did not restore data-plane intercept. URGENT: deeper binary/runtime diagnostic OR full hot-revert to cycle 95 needed. Service UNSAFE for user PII.
